title: Improve ScreenFlow map pan zoom and branch labels
description: Centered the ScreenFlow prototype map, added drag pan and zoom controls, and moved branch labels near outgoing branches with per-edge separation.
decision_notes: Map mode now behaves like a viewport over a canvas: initial fit-center, wheel/button zoom, and pointer drag pan.
Map pan/zoom is stateful while remaining in map mode and is reset when scenario selection changes.
Branch labels are placed near the branch source and offset per outgoing edge so submit/back/redirect labels do not collapse onto the same coordinate.
verification: Browser smoke on http://localhost:5173/: map centered, zoom changes transform, drag changes transform, branch labels have separated coordinates
